-- Auto-generated import. Review before running against production D1. BEGIN TRANSACTION; INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (slug, name) VALUES ('keychains', 'Keychains'); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'engraved-leather-keychain'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'engraved-leather-keychain', 'Personalized Engraved Leather Keychain', 'Full-grain leather keychain, custom engraved with a name, initials, or short message. A simple everyday gift that always lands.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Keychains'), 'engraving', 1600, NULL, 1, 1 ); INSERT INTO variant_option_types (product_id, name, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'engraved-leather-keychain'), 'Color', 0); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'engraved-leather-keychain') AND name = 'Color'), 'Black', 0); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'engraved-leather-keychain') AND name = 'Color'), 'Brown', 1); INSERT INTO add_ons (product_id, add_on_key, label, description, price_cents, requires_input, input_type, input_label, input_max_length, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'engraved-leather-keychain'), 'gift_box', 'Add Gift Box', 'Arrives wrapped in a kraft gift box, ready to give', 400, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 1); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'occupational-engraved-keychain'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'occupational-engraved-keychain', 'Occupational Engraved Keychain', 'Engraved keychain themed for a specific job or profession (nurse, teacher, electrician, and more), personalized with a name.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Keychains'), 'engraving', 1600, NULL, 0, 1 ); INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (slug, name) VALUES ('passport-holders', 'Passport Holders'); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'foil-stamped-passport-holder'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'foil-stamped-passport-holder', 'Foil-Stamped Leather Passport Holder', 'Genuine leather passport holder, hot foil stamped with a monogram or short name in gold, silver, or rose gold.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Passport Holders'), 'foil_stamp', 2600, NULL, 1, 1 ); INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (slug, name) VALUES ('luggage-tags', 'Luggage Tags'); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'leather-luggage-tag'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'leather-luggage-tag', 'Personalized Leather Luggage Tag', 'Durable leather luggage tag, UV printed or foil stamped with a name and contact info window. Great for travel and as a matching set with the passport holder.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Luggage Tags'), 'uv_print', 1800, NULL, 1, 1 ); INSERT INTO variant_option_types (product_id, name, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'leather-luggage-tag'), 'Color', 0); INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (slug, name) VALUES ('gift-sets', 'Gift Sets'); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'passport-luggage-tag-set', 'Passport Holder + Luggage Tag Gift Set', 'Matching set: foil-stamped passport holder and UV-printed luggage tag in the same leather color, personalized together. Our most popular travel gift bundle.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Gift Sets'), 'foil_stamp', 4000, NULL, 1, 1 ); INSERT INTO variant_option_types (product_id, name, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'Leather Color', 0); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'SET-BRN', '{"Leather Color": "Brown"}', 0, 12); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'SET-NVY', '{"Leather Color": "Navy"}', 0, 8); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'SET-TAN', '{"Leather Color": "Tan"}', 0, 8); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'monogram', 'Monogram for Passport Holder (up to 3 letters)', 'text', 1, 3, 'Letters only, e.g. ABC', NULL, 0); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'tag_name', 'Name on Luggage Tag', 'text', 1, 24, 'Appears on the front of the tag', NULL, 1); INSERT INTO add_ons (product_id, add_on_key, label, description, price_cents, requires_input, input_type, input_label, input_max_length, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'passport-luggage-tag-set'), 'gift_box', 'Add Matching Gift Box', 'Both pieces arrive together in one branded gift box', 500, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0); INSERT OR IGNORE INTO categories (slug, name) VALUES ('candle-tins', 'Candle Tins'); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'uv-printed-candle-tin', 'UV-Printed Personalized Candle Tin', 'Soy candle in a custom UV-printed tin. Upload a photo or design, or choose a preset, and pick your scent.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Candle Tins'), 'uv_print', 1500, NULL, 1, 1 ); INSERT INTO variant_option_types (product_id, name, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'Scent', 0); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin') AND name = 'Scent'), 'Vanilla', 0); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin') AND name = 'Scent'), 'Lavender', 1); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin') AND name = 'Scent'), 'Sandalwood', 2); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin') AND name = 'Scent'), 'Unscented', 3); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'TIN-VAN', '{"Scent": "Vanilla"}', 0, 30); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'TIN-LAV', '{"Scent": "Lavender"}', 0, 30); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'TIN-SAN', '{"Scent": "Sandalwood"}', 0, 25); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'TIN-UNS', '{"Scent": "Unscented"}', 0, 25); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'custom_image', 'Upload Your Image (optional)', 'image_upload', 0, NULL, 'JPG or PNG, min 1000x1000px, leave blank to use a preset design', NULL, 0); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'tin_caption', 'Caption Text (optional)', 'text', 0, 28, 'Appears below the image or design', NULL, 1); INSERT INTO add_ons (product_id, add_on_key, label, description, price_cents, requires_input, input_type, input_label, input_max_length, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'uv-printed-candle-tin'), 'gift_box', 'Add Gift Box', 'Arrives wrapped in a kraft gift box, ready to give', 400, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0); DELETE FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'; INSERT INTO products (slug, title, description, category_id, technique, base_price_cents, primary_image_url, featured, active) VALUES ( 'memorial-engraved-keychain', 'Memorial Engraved Keychain', 'A keepsake engraved keychain to honor a loved one, with name and date. Handled with care -- proof sent before production on request.', (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = 'Keychains'), 'engraving', 1800, NULL, 0, 1 ); INSERT INTO variant_option_types (product_id, name, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'Color', 0); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain') AND name = 'Color'), 'Black', 0); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain') AND name = 'Color'), 'Brown', 1); INSERT INTO variant_option_values (option_type_id, value, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM variant_option_types WHERE product_id = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain') AND name = 'Color'), 'Silver', 2); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'MEM-BLK', '{"Color": "Black"}', 0, 15); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'MEM-BRN', '{"Color": "Brown"}', 0, 15); INSERT INTO variants (product_id, sku, option_values, price_modifier_cents, stock_count) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'MEM-SLV', '{"Color": "Silver"}', 0, 10); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'memorial_name', 'Name', 'text', 1, 22, 'Full name or nickname, as it should appear', NULL, 0); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'memorial_dates', 'Dates (optional)', 'text', 0, 20, 'e.g. 1958 - 2024', NULL, 1); INSERT INTO personalization_fields (product_id, field_key, label, field_type, required, max_length, help_text, options, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'memorial_message', 'Short Message (optional)', 'textarea', 0, 60, 'A brief phrase, e.g. Forever in our hearts', NULL, 2); INSERT INTO add_ons (product_id, add_on_key, label, description, price_cents, requires_input, input_type, input_label, input_max_length, sort_order) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = 'memorial-engraved-keychain'), 'gift_box', 'Add Gift Box', 'Arrives wrapped in a kraft gift box, ready to give', 400, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, 0); COMMIT;
